documents.title: catalog_get
documents.summary: Get the compact definition and type-specific metadata for one exact catalog ref.

documents.title: catalog_list
documents.summary: Browse one deterministic level of the authorized LeapView catalog hierarchy.

documents.title: catalog_search
documents.summary: Search the complete authorized LeapView BI catalog across workspaces.

documents.summary: Create one read-only visual from LeapView semantic model fields.
